/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/inference_cli.dir/__/tools/main.cpp.o -o inference_cli  libinference_core.a libinference_metal.a libinference_core.a ../_deps/spdlog-build/libspdlogd.a -framework Metal -framework Foundation -framework MetalPerformanceShaders
